prompt: I'm using Figma to design my app icon and I'm ready to export layers for Icon Composer. My icon has a gradient background, a main shape, and a text label. Can you give me a specific export checklist and layer naming scheme I should follow?
assertions: Provides a numbered layer naming scheme specific to the user's icon (gradient background, main shape, text label)
States that the gradient background should NOT be exported — it should be set directly in Icon Composer
States the canvas mask (rounded rectangle) should NOT be exported
Mentions converting the text layer to outlines before exporting (because SVG doesn't preserve fonts)
Recommends SVG format for vector shapes (the main shape and text outlines)
Includes a structured export checklist (a list of checkboxes or enumerated steps)
